title: CodeClimate Visualiser project configuration
description: Per-project configuration for the CodeClimate Visualiser VS Code extension. Place this file at .vscode/codeclimate-visualiser.json.

reportPatterns.description: Glob patterns (workspace-relative) or absolute paths to CodeClimate JSON/NDJSON report files. Used by 'CodeClimate: Load from Configured Paths'.

items.description: A glob pattern (e.g. '**/codeclimate.json', 'reports/*.json') or an absolute file path.
